title: Seven Deadly Sins Origins
description: Live in a world of sin by adding the Seven Deadly Sins as Origins to your Minecraft Origins experience.
body:
Choose among the infamous Seven Deadly Sins as your Origin.

This Mod includes:

1. Desire - An origin with the desire to be with others. Mesmerize and attract everyone with this Origin.

2. Envy - An origin that wants what others have. Steal and evade from your enemies (Or friends).

3. Gluttony - An origin that lets you consume what you have, no matter how precious, to unleash your fury.

4. Greed - An origin that lets you get more of what you want.

5. Pride - An origin better than every other sin (Or so they think). Ward yourself and scoff at your opponents.

6. Sloth - An origin that benefits from doing nothing. Hibernate and infect others with your laziness.

7. Wrath - An origin fueled by rage. Reap souls and consume them to unleash your wrath.
